risks_fired.evidence: Prior version: no numeric cap in fence, reading-burden was med confidence. Current version: 'give me the top six or so, the ones I actually repeat, not the ones that look impressive' now inside fence. Fence cap + body steer ('Read for the few at the top you actually repeat. How far you take this is yours.') together bound output to ~6 items. Student need not triage an unbounded list. Prior reading-burden TODO RESOLVED. Downgraded from med to low.

5 named interview dimensions meets check_prompts rule 17 structural trigger (4+ named sub-areas). Body callout at L79 targets preamble ('If Claude narrates a plan... ask it to skip the preamble') but conflates preamble-before-action with question-dump recovery in same sentence. No dedicated body primer for preamble-before-first-question. No in-fence 'No preamble. First question:' suppressor. ~40-50% of runs will open with dimension-narration before asking first question. KNOWN DEFERRED per audit instruction (b) — treated as TODO, not blocker.
